data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement of no workflow breakage when labels change.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'No workflow breakage when labels change', but the evidence provided does not include any specific API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case outlines the need for this requirement, yet there is no evidence demonstrating that label changes do not disrupt workflows. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive due to a lack of concrete evidence.
gaps: No evidence confirming that workflow remains intact when labels are changed.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
